Wildlife & Wonders Tour Package

7 Days
Information
Itinerary
Packages
Hotels

Wildlife & Wonders Tour Package

Wildlife & wonders tour package as a name suggests covering major triangle destinations, Kathmandu, Pokhara and Chitwan. Trip Begins from Kathmandu- the city of temples covers core religious and historically important UNESCO World Heritage sites; where travelers can understand culture and lifestyle of Nepalese people. Then moving forward to Pokhara - known as Switzerland of Asia which gives magnificent view of western Himalayan ranges including Mt Fishtail, Annapurna, Dhaulagiri and other mountain peaks, lakes, waterfall, etc. And Chitwan famous for safari in tropical jungles of the Terai that preserves some of the best wildlife habitat in the subcontinent. It offers exceptional biodiversity and a beautiful natural environment. The tropical jungles of the Terai preserve some of the best wildlife habitat in the subcontinent. Beside the popular nature and cultural site tour, during this tour one can be involved in various adventure activity, night life, casinos, discotheques, shopping, etc.

Tour Includes

Special traditional welcome on arrival at International airport
Airport-Hotel-Airport transfers on private vehicle
Night Double/Twin sharing accommodation at Kathmandu
Night Double/Twin sharing accommodation at Pokhara
Night Double/Twin sharing accommodation at Chitwan
Daily breakfast at hotel you are staying at
Lunch & Dinner at hotel in Chitwan
Land transfer from Kathmandu/Pokhara/Chitwan/Kathmandu in private /ac vehicle
Sightseeing and transfer as per the itinerary by private a/c vehicle
Full day Kathmandu city tour
Full day Pokhara city tour
Full day Jungle activity in Chitwan
Mineral Water on board during sightseeing tour
Local Sim card with 4G facilities returnable
All applicable taxes
Meals, Licensed holder tour guide during sightseeing
Entrance & monument fees, Manakamana cable car fee
Bar bills, Laundry bills, Tips and all other expenses except mentioned in package includes heading
Baggage and personal expenses
Any other expenses due to political, Act of nature or any other reason which are beyond control of Travelers Himalaya or its associate agents

Notes

  • Rate is valid for Indian Passport/Voters ID card and Valid till March 2025.
  • Airport transfer Supplement charges will be applicable before 8:00 A.M & after 8:00 P.M.
  • Accommodation in Kathmandu will be Star Category as mentioned. Similar category accommodations will be used in other destinations.
  • Vehicle will not be at disposal but will perform activities as per the Package Inclusions on point to point basis.
  • The above program is just the guideline and can be customized as per your requirements.
